Description.text: [MEMORY] Starting formula. The blood listens before the mind understands.
[VORTEX] Left-Right-Left. Eight days of life. Become the heaviest point on the field and pull the fight around you.
[BLAST] Up-Up-Right-Right. Seventy-five days of life. A needle of condensed nothing unmakes what it strikes.
[MARK] Up-Left-Right. Eight days of life. Leave part of yourself in a place that waits.
[SUPPRESS] Right-Right-Left-Up. Twenty days of life. Close every magical channel on the field for a short time.
[HALT] Up-Right-Up-Left. Thirty days of life. Tell the enemy line to stop.
[SHROUDING] Left-Left-Up-Right. Sixty days of life. Leave the battle before anyone knows you are gone.
[BANE] Left-Up-Left-Right. Twenty-five days of life. Set a shadow over roads, scouts, and camps.
[ENRAGE] Up-Right-Up-Right. Thirty-five days of life. Drive enemies into a reckless rush.
[DISMOUNT] Right-Right-Up-Up-Left. Thirty days of life. Horses are told to be elsewhere.
[REPEL] Left-Up-Up-Right-Left. Forty days of life. Push the world away from you.
[STOP_ARROWS] Left-Up-Right-Left-Up-Right. Forty-five days of life. Make enemy archers remember steel instead of string.
[SCATTER] Right-Up-Left-Right. Twenty-five days of life. Formation is belief; the Gift ends the belief.
[DARK_BARGAIN] Right-Right-Right-Left-Left-Left-Up. No direct age cost. Someone else's years, taken in the oldest way.
[REJUVENATE] Up-Left-Up-Left. Ten days of life. Turn time back by letting it bite somewhere else.
[RESTORE] Up-Up-Left-Left. Twenty-five days of life. Close wounds across your warband.
[FEATHERFALL] Left-Up-Up-Left. Ten days of life. Fall as if the earth has become kind.
[INSPIRE] Right-Up-Left-Right-Up. Twenty days of life. Pour courage into nearby allies.
[MENDING] Up-Up-Left-Up-Right. Thirty days of life. The flesh remembers wholeness.
[CHARM] Right-Left-Left-Right. Twenty-five days of life. Place warmth where suspicion used to be.
[SINISTER_WILL] Right-Right-Up-Left-Right. Twenty-five days of life. Make obedience look like a choice.
[SEVERE_LIFE] Up-Up-Right-Right-Left-Left. Forty-five days of life. Cut life loose and pull it toward yourself.
[CLAIRVOYANCE] Left-Left-Right-Right-Up. Ten days of life. Learn what distance tries to hide.
[HURT] Right-Up-Up-Right-Left. Twenty days of life. A direct wound, simple and cruel.
[RELOCATE] Left-Left-Right-Right. Ten days of life. Move before the eye can follow.
[PACIFY] Left-Left-Up-Right-Left. Forty days of life. Wash rage out of nearby enemies.
[WEIGHTLESS] Left-Left-Up-Up. Thirty days of life. Weight forgets how to hold you.
[LEVITATE] Up-Up-Up-Right. Twenty days of life. The ground asks for you and you refuse.
[DEVOUR] Up-Up-Left-Right. No direct age cost. A life disappears and leaves strength behind.
[CONFUSE] Left-Right-Up-Left-Right. Thirty days of life. Commands arrive wrong and the enemy believes them.
[ACCELERATE] Right-Right-Left-Left. Fifteen days of life. Borrow speed from tomorrow.
[SWAP] Left-Right-Right-Left. Twenty-two days of life. Trade places before the world objects.
[CALLING] Up-Up-Left-Right-Left-Up. Fifty days of life. Call hollow aid from where no soldier should be.
[AURA_OF_HATE] Right-Left-Left-Up-Right. Forty-five days of life. Teach the battlefield to despise.
[HOLLOW_NAME] Right-Up-Up-Right. Twenty days of life. Speak a name that removes certainty.
[BREAK_SPIRITS] Left-Right-Up-Right. Thirty-five days of life. When morale is already cracked, make it shatter.
[LONG_ROAD] Left-Right-Left-Up. Twenty-five days of life. Make every step longer for those who hunt you.
[UNNAME] Left-Right-Right-Up-Left. Thirty-five days of life. Remove a commander's place in the story.
[CRUSH] Up-Up-Up-Right-Right-Right-Left. Sixty-five days of life. Put the weight of the unseen world onto one point.
Carrying and reading this scroll reveals the Tyrant Ritual: prisoners can be sacrificed for youth. If there are no prisoners, the desperate may turn to their own troops.
It was always there. Whatever you carry, you have carried it since birth.
